---
title: >-
  Open Tools, Broad Knowledge: Empowering Researchers for Contextualized
  Metabolite Annotation
venue: Massa 2026
date: 2026-06-22
location: Chieti, Italy
categories:
  - Talk
metadata-files:
  - ../_includes/entities/authors/AdrianoRutz_IMSB.yml
  - ../_includes/entities/affiliations/IMSB_Zamboni.yml
description: >
  Invited keynote lecture given in the frame of the “[Massa
  2026](https://www.spettrometriadimassa.org/conference-2026-MASSA_2026)”
  conference organized by [Italian Chemical
  Society](https://www.societachimica.it/). My first talk in Italian!

  Available
  [here](https://adafede.github.io/my-presentations/20260622_chieti/20260622_massa_chieti.pdf).
---
